text:

Log:
  www/py-ulrjr: mark BROKEN, fails checksum

Modified:
  head/www/py-urljr/Makefile

Modified: head/www/py-urljr/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-urljr/Makefile	Thu Apr 17 12:53:32 2014	(r351469)
+++ head/www/py-urljr/Makefile	Thu Apr 17 13:09:05 2014	(r351470)
@@ -14,6 +14,8 @@ COMMENT=	Common interface to HTTP fetche
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/py-curl
 
+BROKEN=		fails checksum
+
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
